annunciators.name: Mode 0
annunciators.description: Reactor is in mode 0 (Offline). This is normal for the reactor when it is not running, or during startup.

annunciators.name: Mode 1
annunciators.description: Reactor is in mode 1 (Startup). This is normal for the startup of the reactor

annunciators.name: Mode 2
annunciators.description: Reactor is in Mode 2 (Startup). This is normal for the startup of the reactor

annunciators.name: Mode 1
annunciators.description: Reactor is in mode 1 (Startup). This is normal for the startup of the reactor

annunciators.name: Mode 2
annunciators.description: Reactor is in Mode 2 (Startup). This is normal for the startup of the reactor

annunciators.name: Fuel Channel Leak
annunciators.description: One or more fuel rods (channels), have leaked and/or cracked. This is a high priority emergency.
fix: Once core is offline, call engineering and ask to repair systems.
When they give the all clear you may start the reactor back up. Be aware of the Xenon-135 level.
